back_translation: And one angel from the seven, who held the seven bowls, came and said to me, ‘Come, I will show you the judgment of the prominent prostitute, who sits on many waters
She is the one with whom the kings of the earth committed sexual-immorality, and the people who dwell on the earth became drunk with the wine of her sexual-immorality’
And the angel carried me away into the wilderness by the Spirit. And I saw a woman sitting on a wild-beast colored deep-red, full of names that are blasphemy of God, having seven heads and ten horns

And that woman was wearing clothes of purple and deep-red, and she was adorned with gold, precious stones, and pearls. In her hand she held a golden cup, full of loathsome things and the unclean things of her sexual-immorality
And on her forehead a name was inscribed: ‘Mystery, Babylon the great, the mother of prostitutes and of the loathsome things of the earth’
And I saw that woman drunk with the blood of the saints, and with the blood of the witnesses of Jesus. And when I saw her, I was greatly amazed
And the angel said to me, ‘Why are you amazed? I will tell you about the mystery of this woman, and of the wild-beast that carries her, namely the beast that has seven heads and ten horns

The wild-beast that you saw was once existing, and is not existing at this moment, and is about to come up from the bottomless-pit, and is walking toward destruction. And the people who dwell on the earth, the ones whose names have not been written in the book of life from the founding of the world, will be amazed when they see the wild-beast, the one which once existed, and is not existing at this moment, and will appear again
Here, a mind with wisdom is needed. Those seven heads are seven mountains, on which that woman sits. And they are also seven kings
Five have already fallen, one is still existing, and another has not yet come. And when he comes, it is necessary that he remain only for a short time
And the wild-beast which once existed and is not existing at this moment, is the eighth king, and is one of those seven, and is walking toward destruction
And those ten horns that you saw are ten kings, who have not yet received a kingdom, but they will receive authority like kings for one hour, together with the wild-beast
These kings have one common purpose, and they hand over their power and their authority to the wild-beast

These kings will wage war against the Lamb, and the Lamb will gain victory over them, because He is the Lord over all lords, and is the King over all kings. And those who are with Him are the ones whom He has called, the ones whom He has chosen, and the faithful ones
And the angel said to me, ‘The waters that you saw, where the prostitute sits, are peoples, multitudes, nations, and various tongues
And the ten horns which you saw, and the wild-beast, will hate the prostitute, and they will make her desolate and naked, and they will eat her flesh, and they will burn her with fire

Because God has impressed upon their hearts to carry out His purpose, and to make them have one common purpose, and to hand over their kingdom to the wild-beast, until the words of God will be fulfilled
And that woman whom you saw is the great city, which has a kingdom over all the kings of the earth’
